Have Your Say!
Pride in Shoeburyness

Your voice is the foundation of this plan. We understand that not everyone has the time or the desire to take on a formal role on the Board, but every person who lives or works in Shoeburyness has a unique perspective on what our community needs most.

Whether you have a bold vision for the regeneration of West Road and Ness Road, or you simply want to highlight a small local improvement that would make a big difference to your daily life, we want to hear from you. This questionnaire is your direct line to the decision-making process. By sharing your thoughts, you are ensuring that this £20 million investment is spent on the things that matter most to you and your neighbours.

Please take a few minutes to complete the community questionnaire below and help us build a better Shoeburyness together:

    Community Questionnaire








    (E.g. community spirit, green spaces, local facilities, location)






    We will use the information you provide to administer the Pride in Place application process. Your data will be shared with the MP office, Southend City Council, specialist advisers, and the Chair (once selected).

    Read the full privacy notice here: Board Member Privacy Policy

    If you have any questions, either before or after you submit this application, please contact us at: [email protected]

    If you require assistance in completing this application, then please also make contact and we may be able to arrange this.

    Security Verification:

    Bayo In Parliament

    Contributions in parliament from Mr Bayo Alaba

    Southend and Rochford Matters

    I'm Bayo Alaba, MP for Southend East and Rochford. Southend and Rochford Matters is a regular newsletter, updating constituents on what I've been up to. Simply enter your email address below to sign up.
